title: 2022 AMC 12A Problems/Problem 14
problem: What is the value of \[(\log 5)^{3}+(\log 20)^{3}+(\log 8)(\log 0.25)\] where $\log$ denotes the base-ten logarithm? $\textbf{(A)}~\frac{3}{2}\qquad\textbf{(B)}~\frac{7}{4}\qquad\textbf{(C)}~2\qquad\textbf{(D)}~\frac{9}{4}\qquad\textbf{(E)}~3$
solution: Let $\text{log } 2 = x$ . The expression then becomes \[(1+x)^3+(1-x)^3+(3x)(-2x)=\boxed{2}.\] -bluelinfish
